user.title: Set up Remote Devices
user.description: Choose how to set up your IR or RF remote.

new_device.title: Choose device type
new_device.description: Pick what kind of device you want to control. Optionally give it a name.

select_emitter.title: Select {protocol} emitter
select_emitter.description: {device_type} uses the {protocol} protocol. Pick which {protocol} emitter to use.

attach.title: Attach to existing device
attach.description: Add button entities to an existing device. No media player will be created.

attach_select_emitter.title: Select {protocol} emitter
attach_select_emitter.description: {device_type} uses the {protocol} protocol. Pick which {protocol} emitter to use.

abort.no_emitters: No infrared or radio_frequency emitter entities found. Set up an emitter integration first (e.g., Broadlink IR/RF Emitter).
abort.no_ir_emitters: No infrared emitter entities found. Set up an IR emitter integration first.
abort.no_rf_emitters: No radio_frequency transmitter entities found. Set up an RF emitter integration first (e.g., Broadlink IR/RF Emitter on an RM4 Pro).
